title: C64 · Listener-Discipline as the City's Seventh Tier

story.text:
# 💡 C64 · Listener-Discipline as the City's Seventh Tier
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The Archivist's listener-discipline is the City's structural seventh cast tier (spirit-Mage · tutelary register). Active (50% · population-of-one, v1.7.0).
